summary: ITestTarget interface defined in target.interface.ts as canonical contract for all test targets
context: Need a pluggable target system where synthetic, generated, and external repos all conform to the same contract for the benchmark harness.
rationale: Interface lives in src/targets/target.interface.ts with full JSDoc and lifecycle documentation. The types/ barrel re-exports it as both ITestTarget and Target for backward compatibility. Interface adds name property, ScenarioTag, and SeededBug helper types beyond the PRD spec to support the synthetic repo's scenario-specific features.

alternatives.reason_rejected: types/ should contain pure data shapes; the target contract with its lifecycle semantics belongs closer to the implementations
